_comment: Config for app_stdlib.py. Mounted at /etc/guardian/config.json. Host keys must equal the Prometheus instance label (the BMC IP).

10.20.0.20._comment: Supermicro SSG-6049P-E1CR60H (X11 BMC). Its Redfish DATA API is license-locked (OemLicenseNotPassed), so Redfish power control also fails here. Use IPMI directly: prefer=true skips the dead Redfish path. Key MUST match the ipmi Probe target / alert instance (10.20.0.20).
